releaseNotes:
- Introduced multiple new content providers to expand movie and series availability, and many more...

Team Netra

changelog.text: Faster downloads with parallel downloading, including ETA and live speed.
Chat messages now show the exact sent time (e.g., 09:45 AM).
Added a Changelogs section in Settings to view the latest app updates.
Improved Android TV remote navigation for better compatibility.
Added Cloudflare solver support for more sites to improve access.

lockMessage: The app is temporarily locked for maintenance. Please check back later.
